entries.reasoning: This repo is about pgpm/Postgres tooling from Constructive. The name 'just-bash-test' appears to be a name collision — the README has nothing to do with vercel-labs/just-bash; it describes a PostgreSQL workspace generator.

entries.description: DSPy BashRLM wrapper using the just-bash-py library for Recursive Language Model code interpretation
entries.reasoning: The README is extremely sparse (proof-of-concept, no install command, no usage example, no real code shown). Fails install_command_matches_name and has_usage_example checks, so must be rejected despite being conceptually relevant.

The README is a near-verbatim copy of the canonical just-bash README — same wording, same examples, same sections — so is_not_copy_of_canonical fails. There is no original content describing what this project adds (Supabase SQL virtual filesystem).

entries.description: Experimental just-bash port written in 4D language for AI agent sandboxing
entries.reasoning: Conceptually interesting as a 4D language port, but the README lacks any install command, usage example, or evidence of real implemented code. Too sparse to include.

context-fs is a broader platform for exposing APIs/databases as virtual filesystems; just-bash is one of several adapters shipped alongside NFS, CLI, and Linear integrations. It does not pass is_subject_focused since just-bash is not central to its identity.

entries.description: PydanticAI capability that gives an agent a persistent just-bash shell, exposes wrapped Python tools as shell commands, and supports deferred tool discovery
entries.reasoning: Has a clear install command (`pip install pydantic-ai-just-bash`), working usage examples, and a well-defined unique value: bridging PydanticAI's toolset API with just-bash's virtual shell environment.

This is a demo/example repo showing persistent agent memory approaches; just-bash is one of three implementations alongside structured-actions and observational memory. It's a broader example app, not a just-bash-focused library or integration, so is_subject_focused fails.

This is a large full-stack app (RAG + LlamaParse + Mastra memory + just-bash + AI elements UI); just-bash is one component among many in a broader platform. is_subject_focused fails as just-bash is not central to its identity.

entries.description: PostgreSQL-backed IFileSystem with multi-tenant workspace isolation, 70+ Unix commands, full-text and pgvector semantic search, and an interactive web demo at postgres-vfs.com
entries.reasoning: Explicitly built on just-bash with a custom IFileSystem compiling filesystem calls to SQL; has npm package, clear install command, rich README with demos, and is squarely a just-bash filesystem adapter.

This is a minimal bug reproduction repo demonstrating a just-bash js-exec issue. It's a throwaway debugging artifact, not a library, port, adapter, or notable project — describes_unique_value and is_subject_focused both fail.

wterm is a full-featured web terminal emulator (Zig/WASM core, DOM renderer, React component, WebSocket transport); just-bash powers one of five packages (@wterm/just-bash) but is not central to the project's identity, so is_subject_focused fails.
